title: DeepSeek
html:
DeepSeek

Chinese AI assistant. Tracked by Rankett's AI visibility engine as one of the audited LLM providers — and notable for being the only China-origin LLM in Rankett's tracked lineup, which makes it the visible link between the China chapter and the Rankett era of Yahir's work.

Where it surfaces

  • 2025 06 04 screenshot 2025 06 04 at 3 30 55 pm cfbd98e6 — first vault mention, screenshot evidence Yahir was tracking it pre-Rankett
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — featured in Rankett meetup prep
  • 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep revised — revised prep, DeepSeek retained in lineup

Why it matters

DeepSeek matters in the graph for the adjacency it enables: connects China (and Shanghai study abroad) to Rankett (the AEO agency). It's empirical proof that Yahir's China-chapter "Chinese tech pays attention 2-5 years before US tech notices" thesis (from 2024 12 28 ideas) is now operationally embedded in his commercial work — Rankett audits a Chinese LLM because the audit category demands it.

Connections

rankett · ai visibility engine · openai · anthropic claude · google ai overviews · grok · china · china chapter · aeo agency
